overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai walking through a rainy traditional Japanese village. The character moves along dirt paths past wooden buildings, through tall grass toward a waterfall, and crosses stone bridges near a water wheel while heavy rain creates a moody atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway along traditional village buildings

events.description: passing villagers sitting under the wooden shelter on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside traditional wooden buildings, passing villagers taking shelter from the rain

notable_agents.action: villagers sitting under the thatched roof shelter, observing the rain

entered.detail: dark wooden structure with thatched roof and paper windows
traditional Japanese paper lantern suspended from wooden post
wooden shelter with straw thatch roof where villagers sit
thick wooden posts supporting the building overhang
muddy trail running alongside the buildings

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a sheltered dirt path beside traditional wooden buildings in heavy rain. Villagers sit under a thatched roof shelter on the right, while paper lanterns hang from wooden posts. The camera follows closely behind as the character moves steadily forward through the village.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with bamboo grove and waterfall

events.description: exits the covered village walkway into open grassland
sunlight breaks through clouds creating rays over the waterfall

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward a distant waterfall, turning left to approach the bamboo grove

entered.detail: dense cluster of tall bamboo trees with green foliage
water cascading down rocks visible through the rain
tall green grass swaying in the wind and rain
boulder formation near the bamboo grove
tall wooden pole with hanging lantern marking the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village buildings behind, the scene opens into a wide grassland with dense bamboo groves. A waterfall becomes visible in the distance as sunlight breaks through the storm clouds. The character walks through swaying tall grass toward the bamboo cluster, passing a wooden lantern post.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with water wheel and smoke

events.description: black smoke from burning buildings becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the village center where smoke rises, approaching a stone bridge

entered.detail: large wooden water wheel attached to a building
dark black smoke rising from burning structures
simple wooden post fencing along the path
rural wooden house with thatched roof
clusters of white flowers growing along the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a village area where black smoke rises from burning buildings in the distance. A large wooden water wheel becomes visible on the left, and white flowers line the dirt path. Wooden fences mark the boundaries of the village outskirts as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge crossing stream near water wheel building

events.description: character steps onto and crosses the stone bridge over the stream

agents.ego_description: carefully crossing the stone bridge over the stream, approaching the water wheel building

entered.detail: traditional wooden structure with large rotating water wheel
narrow stone bridge crossing the stream
flowing water reflecting the rainy sky

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a narrow stone bridge over a flowing stream, approaching a traditional building with a prominent water wheel. The wooden structure dominates the left side of the frame while the stream reflects the rainy sky on the right. The path continues toward the water wheel building as the rain persists.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered, rainy village into an open landscape of nature and ruins. It begins by following a samurai along a dirt path lined with traditional wooden buildings and paper lanterns, where villagers huddle under thatched roofs in heavy rain. As the character leaves the village behind, the scene opens into wide grasslands and dense bamboo groves, with sunlight breaking through storm clouds to reveal a distant waterfall. The environment then shifts toward the village outskirts, where white flowers line the path and black smoke rises from burning buildings in the distance. Finally, the camera follows the character across a narrow stone bridge over a flowing stream, moving toward a large, dominating wooden water wheel as the rain persists.
